message.content:
@startuml
title TCPClient::connectToServer(string ipAddress, int port)

participant "UC1" as UC1 #LightBlue2
participant "TCPClient" as TCPC #LightPurple3
entity "clientStructure\nobjeckt of sockaddr_in" as CS #LavenderBlush4

== connect to server ==
activate UC1 
TCPC ->> TCPC : create a socket \nsocket_ = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
opt [socket_ == -1]
    return -->> UC1 : -1 (socket create faild)\ndestroy TCPC\ndelete clientStructure  
end opt 

CS --> TCPC : clientStructure()
note right of CS: objekt of\nsockaddr_in
deactivate UC1 


group linking ipaddress to clientstructure using AF_INET standart
    
   activate TCPC
   
   
     note left of TCPC:linking ipAddress to clientstructure\nusing AF_INET standart
     
     
     
        
        loop for each character in string
            
            alt if char != '.' then
                
                addChar(char)
                
            
             else 
            
               shiftLeft(8 bits)
               
              end    
              
         end 
        
         
         


        
       
       deactivate TCPC
      
      
          
           group check connection result
           
             
                 opt [connectionResult < 0 ]
                 
                   destroy TCPC
                   
                  delete clientStructure
                    
                    stop
                        
                    
                     
                     end opt
                      
                      end group
                      
  
  

@enduml
